---
name: Bug report
about: Report a command that does not work as expected
labels: bug
assignees: TechnifiedWorld
---

## Command used
snapset <command>

## Expected behaviour

Describe what should have happened.

## Actual behaviour

Describe what actually happened. Include any error output.

## Environment

- Windows version: (e.g. Windows 11 23H2)
- Build number: (e.g. 22631, find via `winver`)
- How you ran SnapSet: (Command Prompt / PowerShell / Run dialog / shortcut)
